summary: Kimi Antonelli crossed the line first at Spa, extending his championship lead after George Russell's retirement handed Mercedes a lopsided result in Belgium. Russell's crash left the British driver 50 points adrift and visibly numb to another mechanical setback, prompting concerns that reliability issues have already decided the title race. Antonelli now commands a commanding cushion in the standings as Mercedes aims to convert its current advantage into a third consecutive championship.
